utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Fantastic ! I have one question : How is that possible ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: He was unbelievable . He was like that ... that ... that Bugs Bunny cartoon where Bugs is playing all the positions , right , but instead of Bugs it was first base ... Alan , second base ... Alan , third base ...

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I mean , it ... it was like , it was like he made us into a team .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yep , we sure showed those Hassidic jewellers a thing or two about softball ...

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Can I ask you guys a question ? Do you ever think that Alan is maybe ... sometimes ...

emotion_cause.span: 9_Do you ever think that Alan is maybe ... sometimes ...

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I do not know , a little too Alan ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , no . That is impossible . He can never be too Alan .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah , it is his , uh , innate Alan ... ness that ... that ... that we adore .

emotion_cause.span: 13_it is his , uh , innate Alan ... ness that ... that ... that we adore .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I personally could have a gallon of Alan .
